sections.paragraph: Ch. emphat. st. דְּנָה pron. demonstr. i.q. Hebr. זֶה, זֹאת comm. this, Dan 2:18, 28 , 30 , 36 , 43 , 47 , etc. כִּדְנָה like this, so. Ezr 5:7, כִּדְנָה כְתִיב “so it was written.” Jer 10:11. Dan 2:10, מִלָּה כִדְנָה “such a word.” עַל דְּנָה therefore, Dan 3:16 Ezr 4:14, 15 Ezr 4:15. אַהֲרֵי דְנָה afterwards. Dan 2:29. (In the Targums this word is commonly written fully דֵּין, הָדֵין, הֵידֵין for Heb. זֶה; כְּדֵין thus).
